snippet.description:
VOY PA LA CALLE . ROCHYRD вЭМ MOZART LA PARA .

Pa вАШ la calle vamos al рЯТѓ hay que prenderla t√Ї sabe con toвАЩ lo hierro apagando Vela . (Eh) t√Ї no me llega te pongo a gastar la suela mojan si se est√° buscando ahora agr√©gale que suena .

                        CORO
Voy Pa вАШ la calle hoy en alta , no se cuando regreso , siento que ya hasta me hace falta me voy con palвАЩ de peso . Voy Pa la calle hoy , voy paвАЩ la calle hoy.... voy paвАЩ la calle hoy ...(X2)

PaвАЩ la calle voy normal siempre ando con pal de peso menol yo lo joceaba siempre estoy puesto PaвАЩ eso nunca me detuvieron ni coro era travieso tamo activo en la Avenida Dando saco eвАЩ cabra (EL HUESO).

Toy burlao la humildad es que no se pierde careta Pa вАШ lo caretuse el que se quilla pierde rulin de verdad mezclo toвАЩ en el mismo vaso cuando toyвАЩ medio mariao empezamos a beber al paso paвАЩ la calle son al рЯТѓ hay que prenderla t√Ї sabe con toвАЩ lo hierro apagando vela , t√Ї no me llega te pongo a gastar la suela mojan si se ta buscando ahora agr√©gale que suena . 


                       MOZART 
PaвАЩ la calle voy toy cansado de estar en la casa otra resaca pero en eso se me pasa de que vale tener pila de cuarto si usted no goza hay veces que uno manga palвАЩ de peso y lo explota un flow nuevo un cerquillo es suficiente yo me quito y me pongo cuando vuelvo doy corriente yo soy de un barrio pero de un barrio caliente y a mi no me de muela que yo tengo mi Expediente.
Si el sol sale me acuesto la para dando la para paвАЩ la calle yo estoy puesto la fila de los party m√≠o son como la del metro ven vakeame lo perro de los pies que estoy en retro .
    


                        (CORO )
Voy paвАЩ calle hoy ...... , Voy paвАЩ calle hoy ...... Voy paвАЩ calle hoy ...... Voy paвАЩ calle hoy ...... Voy paвАЩ calle hoy ...... voy pa la calle hoy en alta no s√© cuando regreso siento que ya hasta me hace falta me voy con pal de peso , .. voy pa la calle hoy en alta no s√© cuando regreso siento que ya hasta me hace falta me voy con pal de peso

snippet.title: Friends: The Reunion | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
Our favorite friends are back on the set that started it all. Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry, David Schwimmer, and special guests reunite to discuss everything from their casting process to whether or not Ross and Rachel were really on a break. Witness the unbreakable bond of the group that perfectly captured the moment in life when your friends become your family.

Stream Friends: The Reunion May 27 on HBO Max.

snippet.title: The NBA Arrives In Fortnite
snippet.description:
Lace up... The Crossover is going to knock you off your feet. https://fn.gg/NBA

For the first time ever, the NBA is joining Fortnite! Coinciding with the debut of the State Farm NBA Play-In Tournament, Fortnite x NBA: The Crossover brings basketballвАЩs best into the Item Shop and Fortnite Creative, and with Team Battles, a unique experience featuring all 30 NBA teams in Fortnite.

Debuting on May 21 at 8pm ET, players can suit up and rep any of the league's 30 teams. The In The Paint Set includes 31 uniforms, including all 30 NBA teams. 

Also available, grab the Shoot & Score Pack to get the Hookshot Emote and Mini Hoop Back Bling, which can feature the logo of all 30 NBA teams. When other players have the Mini Hoop Back Bling equipped, youвАЩll be able to call your shot! 

If youвАЩre more of a point guard, show off your handles with the Dribblin' traversal Emote.

#FortniteNBA #TheCrossover #FortniteNBATheCrossover

snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Meet Squeak! - Brawler Spotlight
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! вЦЇвЦЇ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! вЦЇвЦЇ https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but donвАЩt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your teamвАЩs safe and try to crack open your opponentsвАЩ. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove youвАЩre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support вАФ or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

snippet.title: Alexis Y Fido, Yandel - Te Reto
snippet.description:
Alexis y Fido, Yandel вАУ вАШTe RetoвАЩ (Official Video)

Stream вАШTe RetoвАЩ on your favorite streaming platform: https://AlexisFido.lnk.to/TeReto!PR

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/alexisyfido/ 

LYRICS 

Fido: Simple, de aqu√≠ t√Ї no te vas, deja que el DJ ponga otra m√°s.
Yandel: No pierdas el tiempo, quiero que te corras el riesgo,
Fido:Lista paвАЩ que perrees contra el ceto

Yandel: Uno, dos, tres, quieto...
Fido: Te reto, a que muevas el esqueleto, veo que tienes un booty perfecto, si te ofrezco un cantito, me pego un poquito y me dices "dame el paquete completo".

Yandel: A que muevas el esqueleto, sientes que en lo oscuro me acerco, cuando digo pare toвАЩ el mundo de acuerdo uno, dos, tres, quieto... te reto.

Alexis: Yoo, para esas nalgas paвАЩ arriba como si esto fuera un atraco, olv√≠dese del glamour qu√≠tese los tacos, dale pal medio de la pista y m√©tele bellaco que te voy a ense√±ar en lo que me destaco, yo soy el m√°s que le mete, el m√°s que promete ven que yo te reto, te voya dar fuete como jinete ya s√© tu secreto y esta noche decreto que aqui toвАЩ el mundo baile hasta que yo les diga quieto, (nobody move) sacude el salitre que la disco est√° llena de buitres no dejes que nadie te registre s√≠gueme los pasos uno, dos, uno, dos y tres en lo oscuro paвАЩ que naвАЩ se filtre, date media vuelta y p√≥nteme de espalda que te voy a subir la mini falda y azotarte esas nalgas, p√©gate a mi como si en la cintura tuviera un magneto uno, dos, tres, quieto... (yo no me quito)

Yandel: Te reto, a que muevas el esqueleto, veo que tienes un booty perfecto, si te ofrezco un cantito, me pego un poquito y me dices "dame el paquete completo"

Fido: A que muevas el esqueleto, sientes que en lo oscuro me acerco, cuando digo pare toвАЩ el mundo de acuerdo uno, dos, tres, quieto... te reto

Yandel: Zumba Yandel, t√Ї est√°s m√°s rica en tacos pero te ves m√°s chula en las retro, fina pero con el coraz√≥n del ghetto, baby si quiero perrearte dime d√≥nde es que te aprieto, paвАЩ faltarte el respeto con muchorespeto, perreame y guayame que el nene se me levante t√Ї sabes mami, conmigo qu√©date, tamos s√°bado y llegas martes t√Ї sabes mami, paвАЩ que ponga ese booty a moverse como si estuviera celebrando, (clap, clap, clap) t√Ї y yo nos hemos escapado un par de vecesdime que esta noche est√°s planeando.

Alexis:(Habl√≥ Yandel baby sigue los pasos)

Fido: A que muevas el esqueleto, veo que tienes un booty perfecto, si te ofrezco un cantito, me pego un poquito y me dices "dame el (paquete completo)

Yandel: A que muevas el esqueleto, sientes que en lo oscuro me acerco, cuando digo pare toвАЩ el mundo de acuerdo uno, dos, tres, quieto... te reto.

Alexis: Barrio Ca, Barrio Ca, Barrio Canino,
Yandel: Alexis y Fido el capitan Yandel, Y Entertainment, (si ellas piden perreo vamos all√°)

Alexis: Impulse, Nesty La Mente Maestra, Gios, Sierra, Barrio Ca, Barrio Ca, (Barrio Canino, Barrio Ca, Barrio Ca, Barrio Canino) entre ustedes y nosotros hay mucha diferencia, rrrrauufff ruuff

snippet.title: Olivia Rodrigo - drivers license (Live From The BRIT Awards 2021)
snippet.description:
Olivia Rodrigo Performs 'drivers license' Live at the BRIT Awards 2021

Shop SOUR: https://smarturl.it/oliviarodrigoshop

Preorder SOUR: https://oliviarodrigo.lnk.to/preorder

Follow Olivia:

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/oliviarodrigo/?hl=en

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/OliviaRodrigoOfficial/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Olivia_Rodrigo?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor

Tiktok :https://www.tiktok.com/@livbedumb?lang=en

Lyrics:

I got my driver's license last week
Just like we always talked about
'Cause you were so excited for me
To finally drive up to your house
But today I drove through the suburbs
Crying 'cause you weren't around

And you're probably with that blonde girl
Who always made me doubt
She's so much older than me
She's everything I'm insecure about
Yeah, today I drove through the suburbs
'Cause how could I ever love someone else?

And I know we weren't perfect but I've never felt this way for no one
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay now that I'm gone
Guess you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

And all my friends are tired
Of hearing how much I miss you, but
I kinda feel sorry for them
'Cause they'll never know you the way that I do, yeah
Today I drove through the suburbs
And pictured I was driving home to you

And I know we weren't perfect
But I've never felt this way for no one, oh
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay, now that I'm gone
I guess you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

Red lights, stop signs
I still see your face in the white cars, front yards
Can't drive past the places we used to go to
'Cause I still fuckin' love you, babe (ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh)
Sidewalks we crossed
I still hear your voice in the traffic, we're laughing
Over all the noise
God, I'm so blue, know we're through
But I still fuckin' love you, babe (ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh)

I know we weren't perfect but I've never felt this way for no one
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay, now that I'm gone
'Cause you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street
Yeah, you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

http://vevo.ly/jMrD19

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

La violencia entre jud√≠os y √°rabes se extiende en las ciudades mixtas de Israel (con importante presencia √°rabe-israel√≠), lo que abre un frente interno al gobierno israel√≠ mientras contin√Їa la escalada b√©lica en Gaza iniciada el pasado lunes. 

Grupos de ciudadanos √°rabes y jud√≠os se han enfrentado y se han producido dos linchamientos: el de un √°rabe en Bat Yam y el de un jud√≠o en Acre. Ambos se encuentran en estado grave.

El ministro israel√≠, Benjam√≠n Netanyahu, ha advertido que "nada justifica el linchamiento de jud√≠os por parte de √°rabes y nada justifica el linchamiento de √°rabes por parte de jud√≠os". Por su parte, el presidente, Rub√©n Rivlin, ha descrito los incidentes como "una guerra civil sin raz√≥n", y ha pedido a las autoridades locales y religiosas que intervengan para detener la violencia.

snippet.description:

Ooh
Na na, yeah
I saw you dancing in a crowded room
You look so happy when I'm not with you

A single teardrop falling from your eye

I make you cry when I run away

But you walked past me like I wasn't there
And just pretended like you didn't care

I make you cry when I run away
Take me back 'cause I wanna stay

I made you think that I would always stay

Yeah, I broke your heart like someone did to mine

Save your tears for another
I realize that I'm much too late
And you deserve someone better

snippet.description:
J Balvin вАУ 7 de mayo (Official Video)

LYRICS

[Audio Bit Alba Balvin] 

вАЬQue tu nombre, Jose, ilumine siempre los rostros de las personas.
Que entre Jose y J Balvin no existan diferenciasвАЭ.

1985, 7 de mayo,
Un barrio en medio de Medallo sali√≥ este gallo,
Con el sudor en la frente,
En las manos callos,
Comprend√≠ que sin ra√≠ces no salen tallos,
Caminando por las calles de F√°tima,
Las cuchas de los parceros con l√°grimas,
Hey! Aspiraciones de maleante,
Y por cosas de la vida termin√© siendo cantante.

Sin redes, sin prensa, la cosa tensa,
Pope con trenzas con Maxi bajo el brazo,
Mucha gente nos tildaba de payasos,
Pero yo era un rey desde que mami estaba en embarazo.

Al √°rabe su hermano lo mataron a balazos,
Pero aprendi√≥ a cantazos,
Todo en la vida paso a paso,
En mi mente la palabra √©xito opac√≥ al fracaso.

Aprend√≠ a navegar en la marea,
Desde El Poblado hasta el Francisco Antonio Zea,
Era muy Nea paвАЩ los ricos y muy rico paвАЩ las Neas,
Todo bello aunque la cosa estaba fea,
Nunca me ense√±aron la palabra envidia,
Y que primero la familia,
Sagrada como Biblia,
Nunca te pases de la l√≠nea,
Porque puedes terminar como Gaviria.

[Audio Bit Alba Balvin]
вАЬSigue siempre el consejo de tu padre, que contra todas las apariencias, lo que queda 
del hombre, es la palabraвАЭ.

Qui√©n dir√≠a que el muchacho cantando en la barber√≠a,
El que la esquina manten√≠a,
Como Los Cangris se vest√≠a,
Y yo supe so√±ar,
Yankee fue el que me entreg√≥ el premio de √≠cono mundial,
Un colombiano haciendo Reggeaton,
Qu√© estupidez,
Pero, yo v√≠ todo con lucidez,
Am√© las tarimas desde la primera vez,
Katherine se arrepiente de ser mi ex,
Pero cero rencor, 
Al contrario, agradecimiento,
Con los maestros, 
Que dieron conocimiento,
Pero estoy claro, no te miento,
Ser una leyenda,
Sin necesidad de monumento.
Y pas√© por ansiedad,
Tambi√©n por depresi√≥n,
Pas√© por falsedad,
Y mal de coraz√≥n,
Gracias a mi mam√°,
Me pongo en oraci√≥n,
Y hoy en d√≠a no me falta la motivaci√≥n,
En mi habitaci√≥n,
La meditaci√≥n,
Para que nunca me falte la conexi√≥n,
Si me muero no recuerden al pegado,
Si no al parcero que ha dejado su legado.

[Audio Bit Daddy Yankee]

вАЬEl prop√≥sito de un l√≠der, siempre es crear a un nuevo l√≠der. Estoy bien orgulloso de ti, y contento de que, por lo que nosotros nos sacrificamos tanto, ustedes est√©n ahora 
 volando por todo lo alto, as√≠ que sigue rompiendo hermanito, estoy bien orgulloso de      
 ti y de √≠cono a √≠cono mundial, mucho respeto papito, te lo merecesвАЭ.

Que soy perro, que hice tr√≠os, porque hac√≠a fr√≠o,
Con mil mujeres me he metido,
A la m√°s santa le he metido,
Que yo hice cosas sin sentido,
Lo s√©,
Pero eso no me hizo m√°s hombre,
Yo era un ni√±o asustado en el desorden,
Y aunque nunca he sido de esc√°ndalos,
Par de gente ha querido manchar mi nombre,
Pero son m√°s los que me quieren,
M√°s los que me apoyan,
Nena tu sabes que salimos de la olla,
Dios te bendiga y te ponga como joya,
S√© que mi m√Їsica te soya,
Yo crec√≠ escuchando a Jay Z y a Beyonce,
Nicky, Yankee, √Сejo de Ponce,
So√±aba con grabar con ellos entonces,
Se me cumpli√≥ lo que so√±aba a los once.








ENGLISH

[Audio Bit Alba Balvin] 

вАЬThat your name, Jose, brings joy to other peopleвАЩs faces.
That between Jose and J Balvin we never see a differenceвАЭ

1985, may 7th,
In a slum in the middle of Medallo, this one was born,
With sweat on my forehead,
Calluses in my hands,
I understood that without roots you canвАЩt have branches,
Walking on the streets of Fatima,
The face of my peers flooded with tears,
Hey! Criminal aspirations,
And I ended up being a singer.

No social media, no press, everything was tense,
Pope had braids and Maxi under his arm, 
A lot of people said that we were clowns,
But I was a king since mommy was pregnant.


The arab guyвАЩs brother was killed in a hall of bullets,
But he learned the hard way,
Step by step with everything in life,
In my mind, the word success overshadowed failure.

I learned to sail the tide,
From El Poblado to Francisco Antonio Zea,
Too ghetto for the rich and too rich for the ghetto,
Everything nice even though the situation was ugly,
Nobody taught me the word envy,
And family is always first,
Holy like the bible,
Never cross the line,
Because you could end up like Gaviria.


[Audio Bit Alba Balvin]

вАЬAlways follow you fatherвАЩs advise, because in spite of all appearances, what defines 
and makes a man itвАЩs his word.вАЭ


Who wouldвАЩve thought that the boy singing on the barber shop,
The one that kept the corner,
Dressed up like the Cangris,
And I knew how to dream,
Yankee was the one that gave me the global icon prize.
A colombian singing Reggeaton,
How stupid,
But I saw everything lucidly,
I loved the stage since my first time...

Todos deber√°n subirse de nuevo al escenario para demostrar su talento y dejar claro que merecen ser los ganadores del programa. Ellos deciden qui√©n debe ganar. 

Santi Mill√°n se pone al frente de esta entrega final talent show que cuenta con la cantante Edurne, los humoristas Dani Mart√≠nez y Paz Padilla y el presentador y publicista Risto Mejide como jurado. En esta ocasi√≥n ellos simplemente valorar√°n las actuaciones pero no tendr√°n poder de decisi√≥n en esta entrega final de la sexta edici√≥n de вАШGot Talent Espa√±aвАЩ. 

resentado por Santi Mill√°n en Telecinco el jurado tendr√° la opci√≥n de llevar a un concursante directamente a la final mediante un Pase de Oro un√°nime. en.title: Santi Marcilla's magic TRICK that drives everyone crazy | Grand Final | Spain's Got Talent 2021
en.description:
The contestants who participated in the Auditions of вАШSpainвАЩs Got TalentвАЩ and who have reached the Semifinals again face the verdict of the jury composed of the singer Edurne, the host and publicist Risto Mejide and the comedians Dani Mart√≠nez and Paz Padilla; in addition to the public present on the set.

Everyone will take the stage to show their talent and to show why they deserve to be in the grand finale. Singers willing to show they have the best voice, risky acrobatics numbers, surprising magic tricks, shocking dance numbers or fun performances in which humor is the main character. This and much more is what we will be able to see in an exciting phase from which the finalists of the sixth edition of the program will be chosen.

In each Semifinal of the talent show presented by Santi Mill√°n on Telecinco, the jury will have the option of taking a contestant directly to the final through a unanimous Golden Pass. The rest of the contestants must submit to the criteria of the audience, which will decide through their votes on the set the identity of the other two contestants who will participate in the Grand Final of the show.

Are you ready to laugh, get excited and suffer with each of the performances of the Semifinals of вАШSpainвАЩs Got Talent?

Welcome to the official channel of вАШGot Talent SpainвАЩ!
вЦЇ If you are in Spain, you can access the best clis at http://www.telecinco.es/gottalent/ and the full show at http://www.mitele.es/programas-tv/got-talent/

snippet.title: ¬њPor qu√© Navarro dijo adi√≥s a los Mexic√°nicos? / La Historia de Navarro ¬њC√≥mo lleg√≥ con Mart√≠n Vaca?
snippet.description:
Como lo vimos en el anterior video, Navarro sali√≥ de Mexic√°nicos para montar su propio taller, el cual se llama Navarro Performance. 

Pero en este video vamos a conocer un poco m√°s sobre la historia de este gran personaje que apareci√≥ durante casi todas las temporadas de los Mexic√°nicos, sabremos desde, c√≥mo fue que lleg√≥ a trabajar con Mart√≠n Vaca, hasta por qu√© raz√≥n decidi√≥ decir adi√≥s a ese taller para el que trabajo durante casi dos d√©cadas.

Adem√°s, hablaremos sobre su nuevo taller y veremos otros de sus trabajos que ha compartido en sus redes sociales, tanto en Facebook como en YouTube.

Agradecemos la informaci√≥n y las facilidades brindadas por parte de Felipe Navarro para la realizaci√≥n de este video.

вЬФ Recuerda que si quieres seguir recibiendo noticias del canal, puedes suscribirte y activar la campanita de notificaciones.

snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - Choker (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots official video for "Choker" from the album Scaled And Icy, available now on Fueled By Ramen.

Twenty One Pilots - Livestream Experience
May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT
Tickets available at http://live.twentyonepilots.com 

Stream/Download Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

Directed by Mark C. Eshleman for Reel Bear Media

LYRICS
I don't bother anyone
Nervous when I stand
Choking on the circumstance
Only smoking secondhand
Cut us open, spread us out
Dry us in the sand
Lay the fibers side-by-side
And you'll begin to understand

I know it's over
I was born a choker
Nobody's coming for me.
...coming for me

I don't bother anyone
Never make demands
Choking on the circumstance
Self-sabotage is a sweet romance
Seems like all I'm worth is what
I'm able to withstand
Sooner I can realize
That pain is just a middle man.

I know it's over
I was born a choker
Nobody's coming for me.

I see no volunteers
to co-sign on my fears
I'll sign on the line
Alone.

I'm gonna change my circumstance
I know I need to move right now
'cause...

I know it's over
I was born a choker
Nobody's coming for me.
(only smoking secondhand)

Like a little splinter
buried in your skin
Someone else can carve it out
But when you've got the pin
It hurts a little less
and you can even push it further in
When your body's screaming out
Trust your mind's listening.
Like a silhouette that you can barely see
As the shadow casts upon the ground
where you'll eventually
lay forever, but the day goes on
the sun moves behind you
You get taller, bolder, stronger, 
and the rear-view only blinds you
